scripts.build: esbuild src/carl.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js='import {fileURLToPath as _fup} from "url"; import {dirname as _dn} from "path"; import {createRequire as _cr} from "module"; const __dirname=_dn(_fup(import.meta.url)); const require=_cr(import.meta.url);' --outfile=dist/carl.mjs
